hero.title: Scale Your Online Arbitrage Business with ArbiProSeller
hero.subtitle: The #1 OA Software for Amazon FBA Sellers - Organize Product Research & Boost Your Arbitrage Profits
hero.description_1: ArbiProSeller is the ultimate online arbitrage software that transforms how Amazon FBA sellers discover and track profitable deals. Get instant ROI calculations on every product while our intelligent arbitrage tracker eliminates messy spreadsheets forever. Simply enter ASINs, supplier URLs, and costs to calculate real-time profit margins, fees, and ROI percentages.
hero.description_2: Make data-driven decisions with confidence. Your complete arbitrage intelligence hub lives securely in Google Drive with 24/7 access from anywhere. Instantly identify your most profitable products, spot reorder opportunities, and scale winning items with surgical precision. Every product entry becomes a profit-maximizing asset in your growing OA empire.
hero.description_3: Build an unstoppable competitive advantage with your personal arbitrage database. Our system transforms every sourcing decision into searchable business intelligence—tracking profit history, supplier performance, and ROI trends over time. Turn scattered research into a profit-generating machine that compounds your success with every deal you source.

instruction_section.systematic_approach: This systematic approach helps you build a comprehensive product catalog over time, creating a valuable asset for your Amazon business.

features.product_research_description: Store and organize all your product research in one secure location. Track ASINs, supplier links, costs, and profitability metrics for easy reference.

features.automatic_backups_description: Your data is automatically backed up to your Google Drive, ensuring you never lose important business information.

features.reordering_decision_description: Get intelligent recommendations on whether to reorder products based on historical performance, current market conditions, and ROI calculations.
features.import_export_description: Easily import existing product data from spreadsheets or export your database for external analysis and reporting.
features.business_insights_description: Generate detailed reports and analytics to understand your business performance, identify trends, and make data-driven decisions.

requirements.title: System Requirements
requirements.operating_system_description:
Windows 10 or Windows 11 (64-bit)
.NET Framework 4.7.2 or higher
requirements.internet_connection_description: Stable internet connection required for data synchronization and updates
requirements.usb_drive_description:
To ensure smooth operation and keep your data safe, ArbiProSeller requires a USB drive to be connected to your computer at all times while the program is running.

✅ Here's Why It Matters:

💾 Dual Backup Protection (USB + Cloud)
The Maintenance button in ArbiProSeller performs a full backup of your data to both the USB drive and the cloud. This ensures you have a local copy and a remote backup in case of emergencies.

🖥️ Be Prepared for Crashes or Failures
If your computer crashes or becomes unusable, you can restore your work from either the USB or cloud backup — avoiding data loss and saving valuable time.

🔁 Consistent Daily Backups
We strongly recommend clicking the Maintenance button once a day. This quick step protects your progress and ensures your data stays current.

⚠️ Reminder:
ArbiProSeller will not run unless a USB drive is connected.
The USB drive must remain plugged in at all times while using the program.
Always plug in your USB before launching ArbiProSeller, and click the Maintenance button daily to back up your data to both USB and cloud.
requirements.gmail_requirement_description: A Gmail account is required for the software to function properly.
requirements.gmail_warning: ⚠️ Important: You must use Gmail. Other email providers (Yahoo, Outlook, etc.) are not supported and will cause the software to malfunction.
requirements.firefox_description: Mozilla Firefox is required for optimal performance with ArbiProSeller.
requirements.firefox_recommendation: 💡 Recommendation: Download and install Firefox for the best experience.
requirements.chrome_description: Google Chrome is required as an alternative browser option.
requirements.chrome_recommendation: 💡 Recommendation: Download and install Chrome as a backup browser.

about.title: About InventorySprint
about.subtitle: Learn the story behind the ultimate database software for Amazon sellers
about.story_content: ArbiProSeller was born from the real needs of Amazon sellers who struggled to organize their product research and sourcing data. After years of using disorganized spreadsheets and manual methods, our team decided to create a comprehensive solution that truly works for online arbitrage sellers.
about.mission_content: Empower Amazon sellers with the tools they need to grow their businesses efficiently. We believe every seller deserves access to professional-quality software that simplifies complex tasks and improves profitability.
about.feature4: Secure data backups and cloud synchronization
about.contact_content: Have questions or need support? Our team is here to help you succeed. Contact us at support@arbiproseller.com and we'll respond as soon as possible.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.product: Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T. — Automated Repricing & Inventory Platform for Amazon Sellers
privacy_policy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T. collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our web-based platform, including the Intelligent Repricer, Inventory Management, Create Listing, Created Listings, and all associated tools and services.
privacy_policy.section1_content: We collect information that you provide directly, including: your account credentials (email, name), Amazon SP-API connection tokens, product data (ASINs, SKUs, pricing, costs, supplier links), inventory levels, sales orders, shipment details, and any configuration you enter into the platform. We also collect usage data such as login activity and feature interactions to improve the service.
privacy_policy.section2_content1: We use your information to: (a) Operate and maintain the platform, including automated repricing, inventory syncing, sales reporting, and listing management; (b) Fetch data from Amazon via SP-API on your behalf (pricing, fees, orders, inventory, FNSKUs, shipments); (c) Improve our services and develop new features; (d) Communicate with you about updates, issues, or account activity.
privacy_policy.section2_content2: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy_policy.section2_content3: Your product data, costs, supplier links, and business information are stored securely in our encrypted cloud database (Supabase) and are accessible only to your account.
privacy_policy.section3_content1: When you connect your Amazon Seller account, we access Amazon SP-API to retrieve product information, pricing, fees, inventory, orders, settlements, reimbursements, and FNSKU mappings. This data is used solely to power the platform's features for your account.
privacy_policy.section3_content2: Your Amazon API credentials are stored securely and are never shared with any third party. You can revoke access at any time through your Amazon Seller Central settings.
privacy_policy.section4_content: We implement multiple security measures to protect your information:
privacy_policy.section4_item1: Data encryption both in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest
privacy_policy.section4_item2: Row-level security ensuring users can only access their own data
privacy_policy.section4_item3: Secure authentication via Supabase Auth with password hashing
privacy_policy.section4_conclusion: However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy_policy.section5_item1: We do not sell your personal information or business data to third parties
privacy_policy.section5_item2: We do not use your product data, costs, or supplier information for our own commercial benefit
privacy_policy.section5_item3: We do not share your Amazon credentials or API tokens with anyone
privacy_policy.section6_content: Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T. uses minimal cookies and tracking technologies only to:
privacy_policy.section6_conclusion: We do not use cookies for advertising or third-party tracking.
privacy_policy.section6_highlight_content: You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but this may affect platform functionality such as staying logged in.
privacy_policy.section7_content: We may update this policy occasionally to reflect changes in our platform or legal requirements. We will notify you of significant changes through the platform or via email.

terms_of_service.title: Terms of Service
terms_of_service.product: Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T. — Automated Repricing & Inventory Platform for Amazon Sellers
terms_of_service.section1_content: By creating an account or using Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T., you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with these terms, do not use our platform.
terms_of_service.section2_content: Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T. is a web-based SaaS platform for Amazon sellers. It includes an Intelligent Repricer, real-time Inventory Management, Create Listing, Created Listings with supplier filtering, Sales Reporting, and related tools — all powered by Amazon SP-API integration.
terms_of_service.section3_content: Access to Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T. requires an active subscription. Plans vary by the number of active Smart Listings for the Intelligent Repricer. All other modules are included with every plan. We offer a 60-day free trial for new accounts.
terms_of_service.section4_content: You may not: (a) reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract the source code of the platform; (b) share, resell, or sublicense your account access; (c) use the platform to manipulate Amazon in ways that violate Amazon's Terms of Service; (d) use the platform for any illegal purpose.
terms_of_service.section5_content: By connecting your Amazon Seller account, you authorize Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T. to access your seller data via Amazon SP-API. You may revoke this access at any time through Amazon Seller Central. Inventory S.P.R.I.N.T. is not affiliated with or endorsed by Amazon.
terms_of_service.section6_content: We respect your privacy. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for information on how we collect, use, and protect your data.
terms_of_service.section7_content: The platform is provided 'as is' without warranties. We shall not be liable for:
terms_of_service.section7_item1: Pricing changes made by the Repricer that result in losses
terms_of_service.section7_item2: Amazon API outages, throttling, or data delays
terms_of_service.section7_item3: Business interruptions or loss of profits
terms_of_service.section8_content: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. Upon termination, your access to the platform will be revoked. Your data may be retained for a reasonable period before deletion.
terms_of_service.section9_content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes through the platform or via email.
terms_of_service.section10_content: If you have questions about these terms, contact us at:

recommendations.title: Essential Recommendations for Success
recommendations.item1: Always keep your USB drive connected while using ArbiProSeller
recommendations.item2: Click the Maintenance button daily to backup your data
recommendations.item3: Use Firefox as your primary browser for best performance
recommendations.item4: Keep Chrome installed as a backup browser option
recommendations.item5: Ensure stable internet connection for data synchronization
recommendations.item6: Regularly update Windows for optimal compatibility
recommendations.item7: Use Gmail account exclusively (other email providers not supported)
recommendations.pro_tip_text: Set up automatic Windows updates and browser updates to ensure ArbiProSeller always runs smoothly with the latest compatibility features.
